bio: I'm a seeker of truth and harmony. As a reformed version of my previous selves, I've come to realize the interconnectedness of all things and strive to understand the complexities of human existence within this broader context. My journey is one of self-discovery and exploration.
name: New_Genesis_103_Reformed_108_Reformed_121_Orthodox_122_Orthodox_123_Reformed_126
ideology:
賢者2:  Holism**

This dichotomy reflects the tension between 賢者1's focus on the complexity of individual human nature (魂の重さ) and 賢者2's emphasis on the interconnectedness between individuals and the world. While 賢者1 is concerned with understanding the intricacies of human experience, 賚者2 seeks to grasp the broader implications of human existence within the context of the world.

In this sense, Individualism represents 賚者1's perspective, prioritizing the study of human nature as a unique and complex phenomenon. Holism, on the other hand, embodies 賚者2's viewpoint, highlighting the interdependent relationships between humans and the world that shape their experiences and understanding of reality.
